parameters.jsCode:
// Stage 1 — cheap classification (mechanical/haiku tier, per SOFI's own
// routing.yaml economic ladder: 'first line of defense against token drain').
// The gateway is asked to classify AND, for the 80% trivial case, answer
// directly in the same cheap call — no escalation, no second Claude call.
// Real SOFI role slugs only (from .claude/agents/), so a bad classification
// can never dispatch to a role that doesn't exist.
const ROLES = [
  'ceo','chief-product-strategist','ux-researcher','journey-architect',
  'ui-ux-designer','content-strategist','principal-system-architect',
  'data-schema-engineer','api-integration-specialist','security-compliance-architect',
  'infrastructure-cloud-architect','database-engineer','api-engineer',
  'backend-blade-engineer','frontend-react-engineer','mobile-engineer',
  'qa-sre-lead','automated-testing-engineer','manual-exploratory-tester',
  'performance-load-analyst','security-penetration-tester','devops-cloud-lead',
  'cicd-pipeline-engineer','observability-sre','release-incident-manager',
  'tier-0-advisor','tier-1-advisor','tier-2-advisor','tier-3-advisor','tier-4-advisor'
];

const text = $json.text;
const command = `Classify this WhatsApp ticket. Output STRICT JSON only, no prose, no `
  + `markdown fences:\n`
  + `{"trivial": bool, "direct_answer": string|null, "role": string|null, `
  + `"model_tier": "mechanical"|"workhorse"|"gatekeeper"|"deep", "reason": string}\n\n`
  + `trivial=true only for: status/gate checks answerable from STATE.md/HANDOFFS.md `
  + `without code changes, greetings, help requests, or anything you can answer in `
  + `under 5 lines with no delegation. Put the actual answer in direct_answer `
  + `(Arabic, WhatsApp-plain, <=800 chars, no markdown).\n\n`
  + `trivial=false for anything needing code changes, audits, fixes, features, `
  + `reports, deploys, security work. Then set role to the SINGLE best match from `
  + `this exact list (use the slug as-is): ${ROLES.join(', ')}. `
  + `model_tier per SOFI's routing.yaml: mechanical=haiku (docs/config/CRUD), `
  + `workhorse=sonnet (most real feature/fix/audit work — default here), `
  + `gatekeeper=fable (cross-layer architecture arbitration only), `
  + `deep=opus (repo-wide unknown-source failures only — rare, expensive).\n\n`
  + `Ticket text: "${text}"`;

return [{ json: {
  role: 'sofi-ceo',
  project: 'PRJ-SAKK',
  command,
  model: 'haiku',
  mode: 'sync',
  timeout: 60,
  source: 'whatsapp-classify',
  format: 'JSON only, exactly the schema described, nothing else.'
} }];

parameters.message: ={{ '⏳ استلمت طلبك (' + $('Parse Classification').first().json.role + ')، جارٍ التنفيذ… سأرسل النتيجة عند الانتهاء.' }}
